subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Numerous letters have been dispatched unto thee, and likewise a missive [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکاتیب متعدده از برای آنجناب ارسال شد و همچنین مکتوبی
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
